feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cold Store connection name change while importing the ADSO in BW4HANA
entry.content:
In the ADSO Data Tiering properties, we can enable the hot, warm and cold tiers. While selecting the cold tier, system asks for the Cold Store connection name. We have set the connection name in DEV as SAPIQDEV but the cold store connection name is different in QA environment which is SAPIQQA but while importing the ADSO from DEV to QA, the transport is failing with the message that the connection with the name SAPIQDEV does not exist. 

Is there a way where the connection name is changed automatically while importing the ADSO i.e., from SAPIQDEV to SAPIQQA?

Thanks

entry.title: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content:
I just changed the connection client between BW/4HANA and SAP S/4,
　An error occurred in part of the connection to S/4.
　
　The error occurred in the DTP execution process that uses delta updates,
　There was no particular dump on ST22, and the error log in the process chain,
　The error log in the process chain showed only the error “odp_prefetch/error 000001”.
　
　I found the following knowledge question about a similar error, but it did not contain a solution,
　The solution was not listed.
　https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/dtp-failing-with-error-object-not-found/qaq-p/12486126

　I would appreciate it if you could provide me with any possible countermeasures or points to look at in the above.
　The error was caused by a delta update,
　If you have any information, please let us know.
　
　Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Hierarchy node not visible in BW Query
entry.content:
Hi guys!

I have a BW Query that use a custom made hierarchy base on infoobject 0COSTELMNT,  the cost element account in question has data in the ADSO but when I execute the BW Query in Analysis Office 2.8.20 is not visible in the query unless I deactivate the hierarchy in the BW Query.  The cost element account is within a range and well define in Tcode RSH1.

So far the way I have solved this issue is by unchecking the option "suppress unassigned node" in the hierarchy attributes settings and activate the hierarchy again.

Is there a way to solved this issues?, Has anything similar happened to anyone?

Thanks in advance, Oscar.

entry.title: How to find Process Chain Name from SM37 JOB
entry.content:
Hi all!

This topic has come up more than once. But I didn't find the answer.

We have background jobs. We can see them in SM37. I'm specifically interested only in jobs broadcast. How can I find chain information by job name?

The name of the first task in the picture is BIBCAST0MNRRXXM0PI63KHK92B09LAA8. (picture SM37 shows)

We can see that it corresponds to the program RSBATCH_EXECUTE_PROZESS with the variant &0000019591199. (SM37 job journal)

In which table can you see the correspondence of this PROGRAM and VARIANT to the program being launched with its variant?

In SE38 we can see Text for VARIANT

How can I translate this VARIANT (Text of VARIANT) to name and variant starting program or name of chain or name of node chain? Any useful information.
For this example I know this is RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH with the variant Z_DS_BLR. Picture RSRD_LOG below.

Where and why can I find corresponding between

RSBATCH_EXECUTE_PROZESS with the variant &0000019591199 and

RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH with the variant Z_DS_BLR ?

I want to know CHAIN NAME (or CHAIN NODE NAME) that started this job (by JOB NAME or JOB COUNT). Or I just need to know the variant for RSRD_BROADCAST_BATCH (picture RSRD_LOG shows) corresponding JOB NAME in SM37 (Picture #1 / table TBTCO).

The picture shows the node of chain for this example. I know this chain. 

But I don’t know all running chains. I think there should be tables that have this corresponding without compress/decompress text.

Respect and gratitude for your help.
Igor

entry.title: Remove validity characteristic from validity table
entry.content:
Hi guys!

We hava a BW/4HANA 2.0 SP16 system.

And also we have an inventory ADSO with data on it.  This ADSO have 0CALDAY and 0PLANT as part of the validity table.

For testing reason I delete validity characteristic 0PLANT as you can see in the following picture

 

When I try to activate the ADSO i get the following errors

 Do I have to delete the whole content of the ADSO in order to modify the validity table or is there a way around.

Thank you,

Br. Oscar A.

entry.title: 2503684 - SAP S/4HANA: new design of the views in CKM3 and the impact on BW/4HANA
entry.content: What is the impact of the new design on BW/4HANA? Does BW/4HANA need to be adapted, and if so, which adaptations are possible?

entry.title: FSI0-FSV report hierarchy node has contain runtime calculation but not comes in B4HANA 0GL_Account.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on a AFO report, I am facing an issue and need your help on it.

There is T-code FSI0 , running a report FSV in S4HANA in hierarchy node there is real time calculation in it.

Note: Hierarchy does not contain node, even Node has it is real time calculation. 

When this hierarchy we are using in BW4HANA through 0GL_Account, real time calculation is not updating in 0GL_Account and and not reflection in AFO.

How to see this calculation in BW4HANA report.? please share how to see calculated values in BW4HANA report

Not found node as per below Screen Short.

Regards,

Swati

entry.title: Issue with Range Partition (/B**/FKO**)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have recently received an alert for the table SAPB***./B**/FKO** , specifically Partition 4, in our BPC Production system (***). Upon investigation, we found that the Range partition was executed on the key "KEY_KOII***" with the following ranges: 0, 1, 2, and others (*). However, only data for range 0 is present while ranges 1 and 2 are missing.

Table Name: /B**/FKO**

It seems that the data has been recorded under partition ID 4 (i.e., *). Looks like the partitioning was not performed correctly (in DIGITS), and the ranges were not properly assigned during the process.

Could you please provide a solution to resolve this partitioning issue? Is there an alternative solution that can be performed online without requiring an outage? Please let us know if you need any additional information. I've attached screenshots of the table for reference.

Thanks,
***


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BW on HANA Migration to BW4 PCE with mixed modeling
entry.content:
HI All,

We have one question for BW4 PCE migration. We use external HANA view and BW modeling in BW on HANA currently. As what we known it is mixed hana  modeling.

Is it possible mirgrate to BW PCE migration, and keeping the mixed modeling way in the future.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Understand the HANA Generated CalculationScenario
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have below design 

HANA CVs(Ex: CV1,CV2 ) With Input Parameters >> Used as Sources In HANA BW HCPR (EX:CP1) >> Generate External CV for HCPR CP1

The Generated CV ( "_SYS_BIC"."system-local.bw.bw2hana/CP1" with Input Params ) Internally use some generated object as Source which will be in this pattern :  "<Schema-Name>"."0BW:BIA:CP1"  

When I open that object , It has some script which seems to be called as Calculation Scenario.

Questions:
a) How can we under stand that Calculation Scenario Script , As its not SQL.

b) When I use this Generated CV ("system-local.bw.bw2hana/CP1") of CP1  as Source in any further CV , Will that Input Params gets pushed back to the Base CV's ( CV1,CV2 base nodes ) Via CalculationScenario Script ? 

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: how to check 0equipment attr and Text data in hana view enabled as it is time dependent
BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer shows the current runs after login
entry.content:
Hello BW-Experts,

the process chain monitoring in the BW4 cockpit no longer shows the current runs after login.
We have to refresh this view manually every time.
I have discovered that the job ODQ_TQ_JOB should actually be running in the background to periodically
start tasks such as RSPC_RECENT_RUN_CACHE.
This job is no longer running in our system (maybe someone deleted it) and I can't schedule it because it is
supposedly started via the "ODP-framework".

How can I fix/schedule this missing job or repair the non-refreshing monitoring ?

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to replace BW/HANA Composite Provider with new Source Object
entry.content:
Hello All,

In HANA calculation view , we can replace source table X with the some other Table Y easily by using the Option "Replace with DataSource" & in next pop-up/screen it gives me the flexibility to map the columns b/w old table X & the new table Y.

This way no further adjustments required in that CV if we could map all of the required columns.

The same option , I am trying at HANA Composite Provider to replace one source with the new one using the below "replace" option.. But its not giving any option to map the columns b/w old vs new sources. It simply removing the entire source & replacing it with the new one. All of the existing mapping from that Old source are removed.

Is this the expected behavior w.r.t HANA HCPR ? if yes , how can we handle this scenarios in a better way without loosing the existing mappings from the old source.

Thanks

Kiran K

entry.title: oData Parameters edm.DateTime -> initial / emptyValues ?
entry.content:
Hello,

we have created a SAP BW4 Query as oData.
The oData-Service is propagated correctly. Due to our authorization concept, we need to "preFilter" the results using the parameters. e.g.
..../sap/opu/odata/sap/<servicename>_SRV/<servicename>(ZVKORG='1111',ZCOUNTRY='DE',....)/Results?$select=.......

Now we have aQuery-Variable ref. to 0DATE (e.g. CreatedOn). The generated oData-service has the edm-type dateTime, non-mandatory.

Now some datasets have no value for CreatedOn, so it is initial. in DB 000000.
While using this preFiltering we have to input a valid DateTime in URL-Call, e.g:
Z_CREATEDON=datetime'0001-01-01T00:00:00',Z_CREATEDONTo=datetime'9999-12-31T23:59:59'

How should the call look like, when i want to get all data? With all i mean, also all datasets which have a initial mentioned date.

Thx in advanced

entry.title: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow /IMO/DF_FIAA_01
entry.content:
Hi 
DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard Data Flow /IMO/DF_FIAA_01 but are working perfectly.
How to resolve it? The screenshot is attached for your reference.
Waiting for your helpful response.
Thanks

ISKhan

entry.title: Shell Conversion - Remodeling of Aggregation Levels
entry.content:
Dear,

for a Shell Conversion I made the precheck of the BW-Objects with transaction RSB4HCONV (Transfer Cockpit). The BW where i made the check is a BW 7.5 on Hana.

One message of the precheck regarding the doings "before Transfer" is about aggregation levels.

There is a check message that says that the aggregation level needs to be remodelled. The reason for this is that the aggregation level has an infocube as its basis (in which navigation attributes are used). The note on remodelling https://me.sap.com/notes/2443001/E says that a multiprovider/composite provider must be built on the Infocube and the aggregation level must be built on this (before conversion). If a multiprovider/composite provider is built on the infocube and new aggregation levels are copied from the old ones, the new aggregation levels get new technical names.

Has anyone already had experience of how best to carry out this remodelling of aggregation levels? Because if there are new aggregation levels with new technical names, the queries based on the old aggregation levels will no longer work. This will also cause problems in the SAC, right?

Thanks,

Thomas

#BW4 Conversion, #Shell Conversion, #BW4HANA, #Aggregation Level

entry.title: BW/4HANA Task Chain Log Table
entry.content:
Hello BW-Experts,

Is there a log table where the completion status of BW task-chain work is kept? >We cannot obtain information at which stage the BW task chain receives an error.

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Display hierarchies in BW4 for authorization relevant characteristics
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I have a question 🙂

We have multiple hierarchies created for 0COMP_CODE. The characterisitc 0COMP_CODE is authorization relevant. And the corresponding analysis authorizations cover single values. They do not cover hierarchy authorizations.

The requirement we have: an user, who is authorized for e.g. company code 0200, should be able to see the whole hierarchy (from root node, down the tree to the node, where the company code is assigend). At the same time, I need to guarantee, that only values for authorized company codes are shown. 

Is this somehow possible?

System: BW/4HANA 2023 SP2

Thank you very much!

Kamil

entry.title: How to add a calculated field to HCPR?
entry.content:
Hello to all of you,

How to create a calculated field in my Composite Provider, when the additional functions in the context menu aren't available? Should I activate any feature in Eclipse?

 Kind Regards,
HH

entry.title: How to access comments in BW/4HANA for reporting purposes
entry.content:
I have used the commenting function in #BW/4HANA for data point comments in a query. Technically, the document store object is used. The following image shows my architecture

I have recorded two comments. Now I would like to evaluate the comments in a separate report or process them with machine learning later.

 

The question now is how I can access the comments in the #BW/4HANA backend. When I look at the data (tables via SE11) in DSO /1BW/DOAHD5Z, I see all the data around the comment, but not the comment itself.

 

The question now is, in which table or where are the comments themselves stored and how can I access them to build a report based on them. The report shall give me only all comments.
